title: Smoky Brazilian Wrap
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Brazilian-inspired wrap, perfect for a quick meal or snack. The smoky flavor of the chicken pairs well with the freshness of the vegetables.
instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook until tender.
Warm the tortilla in the pan for about 30 seconds on each side.
Assemble the wrap by placing the smoked chicken, cooked vegetables, cilantro, and avocado on the tortilla.
Drizzle with Brazilian-style salsa and top with shredded cheese.
Fold the bottom half of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
